function.name: search_recent_documents
function.long_description: Retrieves documents that were modified recently and contain the specified search query.
example_user_queries: Search for "release checklist" in documents from the last 7 days.
Find recent documents about "customer escalations" from the past 30 days.
Search for "incident response" in files added within 14 days.
Look up "quarterly planning" in documents from the last 60 days.
Search recent documents for "security audit" over the past 10 days.
Find documents mentioning "warehouse inventory" from the last 21 days.
Search for "design review" in docs created in the last 5 days.
Look for recent matches on "pricing update" within 45 days.
Search documents from the past 90 days for "board meeting".
Run a recent document search for query "API deprecation" and days 15.
